elements.name: nova-template
elements.description: Vue marker for binding compiled Nova SFC templates to a Nova canvas.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Path to a `.nova` file used by the Nova Vite compiler.

attributes.name: source
attributes.description: Debug source path injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

attributes.name: debug-id
attributes.description: Debug identifier injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

vue-components.name: nova-template
vue-components.description: Vue marker for binding compiled Nova SFC templates to a Nova canvas.

props.name: src
props.description: Path to a `.nova` file used by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: component
props.description: Compiled Nova component constructor injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: source
props.description: Debug source path injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: debug-id
props.description: Debug identifier injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: options
props.description: Template options forwarded to the compiled Nova component.

props.name: data
props.description: Template data forwarded to the compiled Nova component.

vue-components.name: Root
vue-components.description: Root UI Kit tree node. Provides layout bounds, inherited styles and NovaCSS stylesheet context.

props.name: id
props.description: Stable component id. Nova runtime uses it for component lookup, refs and diagnostics.

props.name: key
props.description: Stable key for Nova template reconciliation.

props.name: ref
props.description: Template ref name exposed through Nova scope refs.

props.name: ref-key
props.description: Dynamic ref bucket key for repeated Nova template nodes.

props.name: context
props.description: Explicit Nova context object forwarded to this node subtree.

props.name: layout
props.description: Parent layout intent for Flex/Grid containers: size, span, margins, order, alignment and flex behavior.

props.name: if
props.description: Nova compiler conditional render expression. Use instead of Vue v-if inside NovaCanvas DSL.

props.name: else-if
props.description: Nova compiler else-if condition for the previous conditional DSL node.

props.name: else
props.description: Nova compiler fallback branch marker for the previous conditional DSL node.

props.name: for
props.description: Nova compiler repeat expression, for example `item in items`. Use instead of Vue v-for inside NovaCanvas DSL.

props.name: class
props.description: Nova style class mapped to the runtime `className` prop. Supports built-in utilities `hidden`/`shown` and responsive prefixes `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:` for any class, for example `hidden md:shown md:box`.
props.type: string | Array<string | Record<string, boolean>> | Record<string, boolean>

props.name: attrs
props.description: Raw style-engine attributes. Scoped Nova styles also write their scope marker here.

props.name: x
props.description: Root X coordinate.

props.name: y
props.description: Root Y coordinate.

props.name: width
props.description: Root width, usually provided by NovaCanvas.

props.name: height
props.description: Root height, usually provided by NovaCanvas.

props.name: padding
props.description: Root content padding.

props.name: style
props.description: Base inherited text style for the UI Kit tree.

props.name: styleSheet
props.description: NovaCSS stylesheet source or compiled asset applied to this tree.

props.name: background
props.description: Root background fill.

props.name: border
props.description: Root border declaration.

props.name: clip
props.description: Clip the full UI Kit tree to root bounds.

props.name: display
props.description: UI Kit display mode. `none` hides the node, disables hit-test and excludes it from UI Kit layout without destroying the instance; `normal` restores it.

props.name: cursor
props.description: Default cursor declaration for the root subtree.

props.name: cursorContext
props.description: Default cursor context for the root subtree.

props.name: className
props.description: Runtime style class name. In templates prefer `class`; responsive class tokens such as `md:box` are valid.

props.name: attrs
props.description: Raw style-engine attributes.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Nova DSL children compiled into this component.
